title: Agent Tasks Execution Pattern
description: Agent tasks are executed in a specific pattern, where multiple tasks are spawned and then executed sequentially.

title: High-Latency Activity
description: An activity with high latency (10000ms) occurred for agent tasks recovery.

title: Task Completion and Spawning Pattern
description: There's a correlation between task completion and spawning new tasks, where completed tasks are followed by new task spawning.

title: Metabolic Pulse and Training Scan Pattern
description: Metabolic pulse events are frequently followed by training scan events.

title: Agent Task Spawning Bottleneck
description: Agent task spawning seems to be a bottleneck, with high latency and repeated spawning attempts.
